newFindings.title: 021-content-topups strategy status lists planned but phase is complete

upgradeAssessments.reason: Documentation gap only; no tool depends on parent phase map for correctness
Parent status display error; resume routing uses graph-metadata.json, not parent status
Empty directory doesn't break any workflow; missing docs are a documentation gap
Template existence already partially covered by P0-002 (duplicate numbering)
Stale references don't cause incorrect behavior — just point to old names
Documentation completeness; no automated tooling depends on handoff criteria table
Missing entries make phases invisible to graph traversal — traceability gap, not correctness break
